frontCameraAligned: Front camera aligned. Refine finish selection, then move into Config Lab for lens setup.
captureInstruction: Capture a still or continue to prescription configuration.
stillCaptured: Still captured. Share export preview coming from connected device workflow.
status.unsupported: Live try-on needs a camera-capable browser
status.no-face: Position your face inside the camera view
capture.unavailable: Start live try-on before capturing a still.
title: Virtual Try-On
subtitle: See how Aero X1 fits your face before configuring lenses
privacyDisclaimer: Local execution only: camera stream is processed locally and never uploaded.
fallbackDesc: To experience real-time 3D Virtual Try-On, please allow camera permissions. Alternatively, you can browse and customize the product frame below.
fitHint.tooFar: Please get closer to the camera
camera.allowAccess: Please allow camera access in your browser.
camera.allowInstructions: Allow device stream and click retry
